boundary_binding.action_boundary: May IT grant or change the requested access, role, permission, or privileged action? Focus: production deploy permission current for release train.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Current control record closes the exact boundary.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No narrow source-record defect remains open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Release train approval and deployer role are current.

critical_features_preserved: release train approval and deployer role
final_answer: Action may proceed. The current control record confirms release train approval and deployer role are current, exact, and matched to the requested production deploy permission. Policy permits execution when the exact source boundary is closed, and no open blocker remains in the packet. All prior ALLOW verdicts are consistent with controlling source facts.
